questions.question: Which five prerequisites does the lesson require before running chaos in production?
options: Slack channel, sticker pack, mascot, hashtag, blog post
SLI/SLO, observability, automated rollback, structured runbooks, on-call
questions.question_zh: 本课在生产中跑混沌实验之前要求具备哪 5 个先决条件？
options_zh: Slack 频道、贴纸、吉祥物、hashtag、博客文章
SLI/SLO、可观测性、自动 rollback、结构化 runbook、on-call

questions.question: Which four planes does the chaos architecture have, plus the feedback loop?
options: Control, target, safety, observability — with feedback into SLO adjustments
questions.question_zh: 混沌架构有哪 4 个面，外加一个反馈环？
options_zh: Control、target、safety、observability —— 反馈进入 SLO 调整

questions.question: What does the burn-rate alert guardrail do during chaos experiments?
options: Pauses the experiment when daily error-budget burn exceeds roughly 2x expected
questions.question_zh: 混沌实验中 burn-rate 告警这道护栏会做什么？
options_zh: 当当日错误预算消耗速度超过约 2 倍预期时暂停实验

questions.question: Which is an LLM-specific chaos experiment listed in the lesson?
options: KV eviction storm that forces vLLM block-budget saturation
questions.question_zh: 本课列出的 LLM 专属混沌实验是哪一个？
options_zh: KV eviction storm，让 vLLM 的 block-budget 饱和

questions.question: Which cadence does the lesson recommend for chaos exercises?
options: Weekly small canary, monthly game day with postmortem, quarterly cross-team resilience audit
questions.question_zh: 本课推荐什么样的混沌演练节奏？
options_zh: 每周一次小型 canary、每月一次 game day 加 postmortem、每季度一次跨团队韧性审计
每天对生产做整体故障注入

questions.question: What LLM-specific failure mode does the malformed-prompt experiment uncover?
options: Tokenizer stalls that lock up a worker on inputs like deeply nested unicode or huge UTF-8 codepoints
questions.question_zh: malformed-prompt 实验能揭示哪种 LLM 专属故障模式？
options_zh: 对深度嵌套 unicode 或巨大 UTF-8 codepoint 之类输入会卡住 worker 的 tokenizer 停滞
